violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. Manager food safety certificate is current. FMC to re-instate; application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026
Chest freezer lid was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
Ceiling above 3 bay sink in kitchen was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2026
